summary: Tested P0 bug fix: Auto-publish products to tiles collection when categories are assigned in Bulk Editor. ALL 8 TESTS PASSED. The feature is working correctly - products NOT in tiles are auto-published when sub_categories/main_category are set, and the response includes auto_published count for frontend toast display.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Auto-publish logic at lines 10617-10745 in supplier_sync.py correctly identifies products NOT in tiles and publishes them
VERIFIED: auto_published count is returned in response (line 10843) for frontend toast
VERIFIED: Products already in tiles are NOT re-published (auto_published: 0)
VERIFIED: Updates without sub_categories/main_category do NOT trigger auto-publish
VERIFIED: Auto-published products have all required fields (name, sku, price, slug, images, categories, etc.)
VERIFIED: Frontend toast at line 3964-3966 displays auto_published count when > 0
VERIFIED: Both sku-based and supplier_code-based products are handled correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-publish feature for Bulk Category Editor is VERIFIED WORKING. Key test results: (1) When categories assigned to unpublished product, auto_published=1 and product appears in tiles. (2) When categories assigned to already-published product, auto_published=0. (3) When updating without categories, auto_published=0. (4) Auto-published products have all required fields populated. (5) Frontend toast correctly displays auto_published count. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_auto_publish_categories.py
